description_long: This object has an abstract, angular form with a sharply faceted upper body and elongated, stick-like limbs. The upper section is broad and triangular, tapering to a narrow point at the front, resembling a stylized head or hood. The lower body consists of two thin, bent legs that end in small, blocky feet, suggesting a walking or striding motion. The surface is highly reflective, with a glossy finish that gives off dark, metallic hues with subtle reddish highlights. The overall silhouette is dynamic and futuristic, with exaggerated proportions and minimal anatomical detail. The design evokes a modern, artistic interpretation of a human pedestrian in motion.
description: A highly stylized, angular pedestrian figure with a broad, faceted upper body and thin, elongated legs in a walking pose. The surface is glossy and metallic, with dark and reddish tones.
description_view_0: The front view shows the wide, triangular upper body and the forward-projecting head-like structure, with both legs visible in a striding position.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the elongated, angular torso and the thin, bent legs, with the reflective surface catching more reddish highlights.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the tapering back and the separation between the two legs, emphasizing the narrowness of the lower body.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the sharp, sleek lines of the upper body and the dynamic leg posture.
attribute_clothing_type: abstract angular suit with exaggerated upper body and minimalistic lower limbs
attribute_hairstyle: not clearly defined; implied angular head structure
